case_title: REICHENBERG, JEFFREY VS PLANET 9 STUDIOS,A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP CONSISTING et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PLANET 9 STUDIOS,A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP CONSISTING
